infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Soteria Assurance uses the camera to capture audit evidence photos and videos in the field.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Soteria Assurance geotags evidence captured during a site audit so findings can be located precisely.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Soteria Assurance records opening and closing meeting audio for AI transcription.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Soteria Assurance attaches existing photos as audit evidence.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Soteria Assurance to use the camera to capture audit evidence.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Soteria Assurance to geotag audit evidence.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Soteria Assurance to record meeting audio for transcription.
